name: Client Portal Modernization
description: Complete redesign of the institutional client portal with modern UX, real-time portfolio views, self-service transaction capabilities, and personalized reporting. Serving 2,500+ institutional clients managing £800bn AUM.

features.name: Real-time Portfolio Dashboard
features.description: Interactive dashboard showing real-time portfolio valuations, performance attribution, and risk metrics with drill-down capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Portfolio valuations updated within 15 minutes of market close
Performance attribution available at asset class, sector, and security level
Risk metrics (VaR, tracking error) displayed with trend analysis
Mobile-responsive design for on-the-go access

stories.name: Portfolio Summary View
stories.description: As an Institutional Client, I need a summary view of my portfolio so that I can quickly understand my current position.
acceptanceCriteria: Given client logs in, When dashboard loads, Then total AUM is displayed within 3 seconds
Given portfolio has multiple mandates, When viewed, Then each mandate shows separately
Given market is open, When viewed, Then intraday estimates are shown with timestamp

stories.name: Performance Attribution Analysis
stories.description: As a Client Portfolio Manager, I need detailed performance attribution so that I can understand what drove my returns.
acceptanceCriteria: Given period selected, When attribution calculated, Then results show allocation, selection, and interaction effects
Given attribution displayed, When user drills down, Then security-level contribution is visible
Given benchmark is set, When compared, Then relative performance is highlighted

stories.name: Risk Metrics Dashboard
stories.description: As a Risk Officer, I need to see portfolio risk metrics so that I can monitor exposure within guidelines.
acceptanceCriteria: Given portfolio selected, When risk viewed, Then VaR at 95% and 99% confidence shown
Given tracking error calculated, When displayed, Then trend over 12 months is visible
Given limit breach occurs, When detected, Then alert is prominently displayed

stories.name: Mobile Responsive Design
stories.description: As a Client Executive, I need mobile access so that I can check portfolio status while traveling.
acceptanceCriteria: Given mobile device used, When dashboard accessed, Then layout adapts appropriately
Given touch interaction, When user taps, Then responsive feedback is provided
Given limited bandwidth, When loading, Then progressive enhancement is used

features.name: Self-service Transactions
features.description: Enable clients to initiate transactions (rebalancing, cash movements, mandate changes) directly through the portal with appropriate controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Clients can request cash movements up to pre-approved limits
Rebalancing requests are validated against IPS guidelines
All transactions require 4-eyes internal approval
Full audit trail from request to execution

stories.name: Cash Movement Requests
stories.description: As a Client Treasurer, I need to request cash withdrawals so that I can fund pension payments.
acceptanceCriteria: Given cash request initiated, When amount entered, Then pre-approved limits are validated
Given request is valid, When submitted, Then confirmation with reference number is shown
Given request submitted, When internal approval given, Then execution is scheduled

tasks.name: Build cash request form and validation

stories.name: Rebalancing Requests
stories.description: As a Client CIO, I need to request portfolio rebalancing so that I can maintain target allocations.
acceptanceCriteria: Given rebalance requested, When targets entered, Then IPS validation runs
Given rebalance is within guidelines, When submitted, Then trade list is generated
Given rebalance is outside guidelines, When flagged, Then exception approval is required

stories.name: Mandate Change Requests
stories.description: As a Client Trustee, I need to request mandate changes so that I can adjust investment strategy.
acceptanceCriteria: Given mandate change requested, When details entered, Then impact analysis is shown
Given change is significant, When flagged, Then legal review is triggered
Given change is approved, When implemented, Then documentation is updated

stories.name: Transaction Audit Trail
stories.description: As an Auditor, I need a complete transaction history so that I can verify all actions taken.
acceptanceCriteria: Given transaction completed, When audit viewed, Then full trail from request to execution visible
Given audit exported, When downloaded, Then PDF/CSV format available
Given audit searched, When filtered, Then results return in <3 seconds

tasks.name: Create audit search and export UI

features.name: Personalized Reporting
features.description: Customizable report builder allowing clients to create, schedule, and receive personalized reports tailored to their specific needs.
acceptanceCriteria: Clients can select from 50+ report components
Report scheduling supports daily, weekly, monthly frequencies
White-label branding available for consultant-branded reports
Reports delivered via portal, email, or SFTP

stories.name: Report Builder Interface
stories.description: As a Client Analyst, I need a drag-and-drop report builder so that I can create custom reports.
acceptanceCriteria: Given report builder opened, When components browsed, Then 50+ options are available
Given component dragged, When dropped on canvas, Then preview updates in real-time
Given report saved, When retrieved, Then configuration is preserved

stories.name: Report Scheduling and Delivery
stories.description: As a Client Administrator, I need to schedule automatic report delivery so that stakeholders receive reports without manual effort.
acceptanceCriteria: Given report created, When schedule set, Then delivery occurs at specified frequency
Given delivery preference set, When report generated, Then delivered via chosen channel
Given delivery fails, When error occurs, Then retry with notification

risks.name: Client adoption resistance
risks.mitigation: Change management program; client champions identified; training videos created

risks.name: Security vulnerabilities
risks.mitigation: Penetration testing completed; WAF implemented; security review passed

risks.name: Integration with legacy systems
risks.mitigation: API adapters built; phased migration approach; rollback capability
